title: Shattering Hangover-Cure Greek Tangy Ceviche
description: A refreshing and tangy Greek-inspired ceviche dish to cure your morning hangover. Made with zesty lime juice and a hint of Mediterranean flavors.

ingredients.name: Red Onion
ingredients.notes: Thinly sliced, red or sweet onion.

ingredients.name: Greek Seasoning
ingredients.notes: Commercial or homemade blend of oregano, thyme, and rosemary.

instructions: Combine halibut, lime juice, olive oil, red onion, red bell pepper, cilantro, garlic, and Greek seasoning in a large bowl. Mix until the fish is coated equally.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld and the fish to 'cook' in the lime juice.
After 30 minutes, remove the bowl from the refrigerator and give the mixture a gentle stir.
Taste and adjust the seasoning with salt as needed.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap again and refrigerate for another 15-30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld further.
Just before serving, place a few ice cubes in a copper mug and pour the ceviche over the ice.
If desired, top the ceviche with a dollop of Greek yogurt and garnish with additional cilantro.
